title: Pritzelago austroalpina

This family consists of flowering plants that are primarily found in temperate and tropical regions around the world. Pritzelago austroalpina is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Pritzelago, which is a small genus of plants found in Europe and Asia. The genus Pritzelago is closely related to other genera in the family Brassicaceae, such as Draba and Cusickia. Pritzelago austroalpina is a rare and endemic species found in the alpine regions of Europe.
